text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, March 05. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Budget tracking is updated. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
